issues.title: RFC 7231 Allow header violation: only first partial route's methods reported
issues.invariant: HTTP 405 Allow header must list all methods the resource supports (RFC 7231 §6.5.5)

issues.title: Unbound `response` variable in Route.handle if HTTPException is intercepted
issues.invariant: Variables used after conditional blocks must be defined in all non-raising branches

issues.title: Unbound `response` variable in Router.not_found if HTTPException is intercepted
issues.invariant: Variables used after conditional blocks must be defined in all non-raising branches

issues.title: Inner function `app` shadows outer function `app` in request_response
issues.invariant: Inner functions must not shadow their enclosing function's name

issues.title: Non-deterministic Allow header due to set iteration
issues.invariant: HTTP headers with multiple values should have deterministic ordering

issues.title: BaseRoute.__call__ silently ignores non-http/websocket scopes on no match
issues.invariant: ASGI apps must respond to all scope types or explicitly reject unsupported ones

issues.title: Convertor exception produces 500 instead of 404
issues.invariant: Path parameter conversion exceptions must be caught and treated as failed route matches, not server errors.

issues.title: Path parameter name collision in nested routes
Mount path remainder parsing off-by-one with trailing slash
Mount trailing slash stripping hides mount semantics
Parameter convertors re-executed on route retry
issues.invariant: Parameter convertor results must be cached by (parameter_name, raw_value) to prevent re-execution across router route attempts.

issues.title: Match.PARTIAL doesn't encode failure reason
Partial match reason is lost in Router
Redirect_slashes mutates scope path inconsistently
Path assertion bypassed in optimized mode
issues.invariant: Path validation must use explicit checks instead of assertions to prevent bypassing with -O flag

issues.title: Scope parameter shadowing in closure
issues.invariant: Inner function must not shadow outer function name to avoid closure parameter reference confusion

issues.title: root_path calculation assumes single Mount
Silent scope method field mutation between phases
issues.invariant: HTTP method must not be mutated between matches() and handle() phases to prevent routing inconsistency

issues.title: Unknown convertor type assertion message unhelpful
issues.invariant: Unknown convertor errors must include parameter name and location context for debugging

issues.title: Duplicated parameter error lacks instance details
issues.invariant: Error messages for duplicate parameters must include the character position of each duplicate instance, not just parameter names.

issues.title: Allow header iteration order non-canonical
Mount silently ignores routes when app also provided
Remaining path calculation lacks bounds checking
issues.invariant: Path slice index must be bounds-checked before slicing to prevent incorrect substring calculations when idx exceeds path length

issues.title: Deprecation warning doesn't prevent execution
NoMatchFound exception loses route search details
Redirect_slashes only applies to HTTP
Scope mutation before method validation completes
redirect_slashes can redirect to wrong route
PARTIAL enum is semantically overloaded
issues.invariant: Route.matches() must validate methods via exception (ValidationError) before building child_scope, not return overloaded PARTIAL signal

issues.title: PARTIAL handling depends on hidden Route.handle() re-validation
issues.invariant: PARTIAL matches must be explicitly rejected in __call__, not delegated to handle() for re-validation

issues.title: Mount's implicit 'path' parameter collides silently with user params
Method validation duplicated in two places
Convertor type validation uses unhandled assertion
issues.invariant: Path convertor validation must use explicit ValueError instead of assertions to provide user-friendly error messages that name the invalid type, the parameter, and list valid options

issues.title: Mixed error handling patterns in compile_path
issues.invariant: Path validation must use ValueError instead of assertions for consistent error handling

issues.title: 'path' parameter tracking inconsistency in Mount
issues.invariant: param_convertors must not contain 'path' parameter handled implicitly by Mount to prevent matched_params inconsistency

issues.title: BaseRoute.__call__() doesn't handle Match.PARTIAL
issues.invariant: PARTIAL-matched routes must return HTTP 405 Method Not Allowed, not 404 Not Found, with explicit handling distinct from NONE.

issues.title: Convertor regex not validated before re.compile()
issues.invariant: Convertor regex patterns must be validated before use to prevent cryptic re.error exceptions.

issues.title: Router doesn't validate scope["type"] before routing
functools.partial unwrapping stops early
Inner function shadows outer function name
issues.invariant: Inner function names must not shadow outer function names

issues.title: Mount.url_path_for() uses O(n) route lookup with no indexing
Mount doesn't explicitly handle lifespan scope type
issues.invariant: All scope types must be explicitly handled to prevent silent failures on unhandled scope types.
